speaker: MATT
raw_text: From a distance, yeah. However, I need everyone to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The mage hand is going in!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Silence.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But I--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What did you do? (massive explosion)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If I could get a pair of scissors, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What? You're going to cut your beautiful work?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well yeah, you blew it apart! (laughter, cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Thank you kindly.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Look, it's got roots and all sorts of beautiful things.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: "If I could get a pair of scissors, please?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Should we start bringing cherry bombs?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Attack, attack, attack!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so first off--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That was the coolest!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Disadvantage on its dexterity saving throw; fails. Go ahead and roll 2d6 for me please.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Me? Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's only 2d6 of damage? Oh no!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Double ones. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, that's some stale dynamite.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That was a bottle rocket.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A concussive blast blows apart the hollow. You see pieces of shrapnel go flying in every direction. The only one who is not currently protected is you, Nott. I need you to make a dexterity saving throw, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: On my own blast?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, not from the blast. This is from the shrapnel of the tree hollow that has exploded outwards in all directions.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm unprotected.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're far enough away where I don't think it would get to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's okay. You take half damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If you take so much more--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You take three points of bludgeoning damage from pieces of wood flying in your direction. The troll is, however, knocked prone. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He's harder to hit from a distance, at the moment.
